notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas plunked
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas hit by pitch. Teoscar Hernández to 3rd. Dalton Rushing to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Brandon Sproat. Teoscar Hernández scores. Dalton Rushing to 3rd. Miguel Rojas to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Brice Turang GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brice Turang grounds into a double play, shortstop Mookie Betts to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Jackson Chourio out at 2nd. Brice Turang out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jake Bauers plunked
notableEvents.detail: Brewers challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was overturned: Jake Bauers hit by pitch.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Vaughn GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Vaughn grounds into a double play, shortstop Mookie Betts to second baseman Hyeseong Kim to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Jake Bauers out at 2nd. Andrew Vaughn out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Vaughn rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Vaughn grounds into a double play, shortstop Mookie Betts to second baseman Hyeseong Kim to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Jake Bauers out at 2nd. Andrew Vaughn out at 1st.
